name: The Warriors (Jacksmith)
description:
⚔️ The warriors from the game Jacksmith! (Also includes Jacksmith and Scout)

I've been playing this game for the last few days, I absolutely love it. So naturally, I wanted to know more about the characters and how it'd be like to interact with them (especially the warriors, y'know, the ones you give weapons to). So, I made this, and you can also toy around with it yourself. Do your worst if you want, I don't care (not like there's much I can do lmao).

Here, they're celebrating and partying because Dudley (the insane rat wizard who is the main antagonist of the game) was defeated and the Princess was rescued, so yeah 👍

Have fun :3
creator: un_un_un_un
